query:
UPDATE erp_companies 
SET 
  marketingEmail = 'sales@testcompany.com',
  marketingAddress = '123 Business Street, Shanghai, China 200000',
  marketingPhone = '+86 21 1234 5678',
  marketingWebsite = 'https://www.testcompany.com'
WHERE companyName = '测试公司';
